member.name: T:Server.Controllers.SalesOrdersController
member.summary: Provides REST endpoints for querying sales orders.

member.name: M:Server.Controllers.SalesOrdersController.#ctor(Services.SalesOrders.ISalesOrderService)
member.param: Service used to query sales orders.

member.name: M:Server.Controllers.SalesOrdersController.GetById(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a single sales order by identifier.
member.returns: The matching sales order, if found.

member.name: M:Server.Controllers.SalesOrdersController.GetByStatus(System.String)
member.summary: Returns sales orders filtered by status.
member.returns: A list of sales orders with the requested status.

member.name: M:Server.Extensions.ServiceExtensions.AddApplicationServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Adds feature services used by the application.
member.param: Server web root path used by file-backed services.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
